name: TriggerBuild
purpose: Create a new build record and start the build process
behavior: Validate that no build is running for the same repo+branch, create a new build record with status 'running', run compile, test, and package steps sequentially, update status to 'completed' or 'failed', and store artifacts

semantic_inputs.name: build_request
semantic_inputs.description: Contains repo, branch, config with build_steps

semantic_inputs.name: builds
semantic_inputs.description: Database to check for existing running builds and store new record

preconditions: No running build for the same repo+branch
postconditions: Build record created with final status
guarantees: Only one build per repo+branch runs at a time

inputs.name: build_request
inputs.description: JSON with action='trigger', repo (str), branch (str), config (dict with build_steps list)

inputs.name: builds_db
inputs.description: Builds database for reading/writing build records

outputs.name: build_result
outputs.description: JSON with success (bool), build_id (str), status (str), logs (list)

signature: def TriggerBuild(build_request: dict, builds_db: Database) -> dict

data_operations.description: Read existing builds to check for conflicts, write new build record and update status
Write artifact metadata after build completion

constraints.description: No two builds for same repo+branch may run concurrently

name: CheckBuildStatus
purpose: Return the current status and logs of a specific build
behavior: Look up the build by build_id in the builds database, return its status and logs

inputs.name: builds_db
inputs.description: Builds database for reading build records

outputs.name: build_result
outputs.description: JSON with success (bool), build_id (str), status (str), logs (list)

signature: def CheckBuildStatus(build_request: dict, builds_db: Database) -> dict

data_operations.description: Read build record to retrieve status and logs

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns current status and logs for the given build_id

name: ListBuildHistory
purpose: Return all builds filtered by optional repo, branch, or status
behavior: Query the builds database with optional filters (repo, branch, status) and return matching build records

semantic_inputs.name: build_request
semantic_inputs.description: May contain repo, branch, status filters

semantic_outputs.name: build_result
semantic_outputs.description: Contains success, list of builds with details

inputs.name: build_request
inputs.description: JSON with action='list', optional repo (str), branch (str), status (str)

inputs.name: builds_db
inputs.description: Builds database for querying build records

outputs.name: build_result
outputs.description: JSON with success (bool), builds (list of dicts with build_id, repo, branch, status, logs)

signature: def ListBuildHistory(build_request: dict, builds_db: Database) -> dict

data_operations.description: Read build records with optional filters

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns list of builds matching optional filters

name: CancelBuild
purpose: Stop a running build and update its status to cancelled
behavior: Check if build is running, if so stop it and update status to 'cancelled'; if already completed, no-op

semantic_inputs.name: builds
semantic_inputs.description: Database to read and update build record

postconditions: If build was running, status changed to cancelled
guarantees: Cancelling a completed build is a no-op

inputs.name: builds_db
inputs.description: Builds database for reading/writing build records

signature: def CancelBuild(build_request: dict, builds_db: Database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read build status and update to cancelled

data_operations.description: Read build record to check status, write updated status
